notableEvents.label: Kyle Manzardo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Manzardo lines out to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr.

notableEvents.label: Chase DeLauter pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Chase DeLauter grounds out, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Paul Goldschmidt steals (1) 3rd base. Cody Bellinger steals (7) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Paul Goldschmidt GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Paul Goldschmidt grounds into a double play, third baseman José Ramírez to second baseman Travis Bazzana to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Ben Rice out at 2nd. Paul Goldschmidt out at 1st.
